title: A River of Waste: The Hazardous Truth About Factory Farms
original_title: A River of Waste: The Hazardous Truth About Factory Farms
overview: This documentary tells details how the practice wreaks havoc on the environment and on consumers' health. Through disturbing footage and interviews with experts, director Don McCorkell paints a disturbing portrait of a food system that uses hormones, antibiotics and arsenic to increase its output with little regard for the damage it causes.
